driver_subject: powercap: RAPL: Add Power Limit4 support for Alder Lake-N and Raptor Lake-P
kernel_subject: sched, drivers: Remove max param from effective_cpu_util()/sched_cpu_util()
stage1_reason: Driver changes adapt to kernel API changes: sched_cpu_util() signature changed (removed max parameter), EM power field precision changed from milli-Watts to micro-Watts requiring MICROWATT_PER_MILLIWATT removal, and code refactored to use arch_scale_cpu_capacity() differently.
stage2_reason: Driver commit bb4479994945 matches exactly the kernel candidate commit that removes max parameter from sched_cpu_util(), directly addressing the API change mentioned in stage-1 reason.
